testcase.name: createNewEmployee
testcase.system-out: [Screenshot] Saved: target/screenshots/01_hrms_form_opened_20260220_174801.png [FormHelper] Force filled: input[title='Please provide a valid and unique Username'] = smc-oy-hd-test06 [FormHelper] Force filled nth(0): input[type='password'] [FormHelper] Force filled nth(1): input[type='password'] [Screenshot] Saved: target/screenshots/02_login_details_filled_20260220_174803.png [FormHelper] Filled: input[required][pattern*='1,50'] = Test Employee [FormHelper] Dispatch clicked: input.radio-btn[type='radio'] [FormHelper] Filled: input[type='date'][max*='2008'] = 1995-01-01 [FormHelper] Filled: input[type='email'] = test@test.com [FormHelper] Filled: input[pattern*='1,300'] = Test Address [Screenshot] Saved: target/screenshots/03_personal_details_filled_20260220_174804.png [FormHelper] Dropdown options visible: 3 [FormHelper] Selected option index: 0 [Screenshot] Saved: target/screenshots/04_employee_details_filled_20260220_174812.png [HRMS] Submit buttons found: 1 [HRMS] Button enabled after first click — clicking again to submit [HRMS] Confirmed with: button.selector-button-primary[type='submit'] [Screenshot] Saved: target/screenshots/05_form_submitted_20260220_174827.png [HRMS] Success message: Employee Created Successfully [Screenshot] Saved: target/screenshots/PASSED_createNewEmployee_20260220_174827.png New Employee ID: smc-oy-hd-test06
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.
